project.name: Arihant Abode
project.address: Sector 10, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh
project.description: An affordable luxury project in Sector 10 offering 2 & 3 BHK homes with modern amenities.
project.long_description: Arihant Abode is a well-planned residential development by Arihant Group situated in Sector 10, Greater Noida West. It spans across 5 acres and comprises 11 towers with approximately 616 units. The project caters primarily to the mid-segment, offering 2 and 3 BHK apartments ranging from 920 sq.ft to 1270 sq.ft. It boasts excellent connectivity to the 130-Meter Noida-Greater Noida Link Road and upcoming metro stations.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A practical mid-segment choice offering functional layouts at a relatively affordable entry price in the high-demand Sector 10 micro-market.
why_avoid: Higher density compared to premium neighbors.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: Good value for money in a rapidly developing sector.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Monitor exact possession timelines before booking.

recommendation.primary_thesis: Standard budget project with good location.

project.name: Irish Platinum
project.address: C Block, Sector 10 Noida Extension, Greater Noida
project.description: An ultra-premium, low-density project offering massive 3 and 4 BHK apartments with 11-foot ceilings and Mivan construction.
project.long_description: Irish Platinum is a landmark luxury development in Sector 10, Greater Noida West by Irish Infrastructure. Spread across 4.65 acres with just 4 towers, it boasts an extremely low density of 121 units per acre. Designed for the elite, it features Mivan construction, 11-foot high ceilings, and sprawling 3 and 4 BHK layouts starting from 1,390 sq.ft. up to 2,550 sq.ft.
marketing_claims: Lowest Density in Greater Noida West

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A top-tier luxury asset in Greater Noida West tailored for professionals upgrading from standard 2/3 BHKs. Stands out for its Mivan structure, low density, and high ceilings.
why_buy: Unusually high 11-foot ceilings create a massive sense of space.
Very low density ensures exclusivity and lower burden on amenities.
Mivan construction ensures longevity and better finishes.
why_avoid: Higher entry price point compared to average Sector 10 projects.
decision_profile.best_for: Upgraders and long-term end-users looking for premium architecture.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: A superior luxury option if the timeline aligns with buyer needs.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Capital appreciation is expected to be strong as the project nears structural milestones.

recommendation.primary_thesis: One of the best ultra-premium offerings in the micro-market.
recommendation.end_use_thesis: Exceptional living experience due to ceilings and low density.
recommendation.investment_thesis: Good entry price for the promised luxury specs.
recommendation.investor_thesis: Capital growth over the 3-year build cycle.
recommendation.risk_thesis: Builder has a clean, though small, track record.
recommendation.timeline_advice: Buy early to lock in pre-finishing prices.

competitors.verdict: Both are excellent; Irish wins on sheer spatial luxury.

project.name: Mahagun Manorialle
project.address: Wishtown, Sector 128, Noida-Greater Noida Expressway, Noida
project.description: An ultra-premium, delivered golf-centric high-rise on the Noida Expressway catering to HNIs and corporate leaders.
project.long_description: Mahagun Manorialle is a marquee ultra-luxury asset located within the Jaypee Wish Town master-planned corridor in Sector 128. Designed by Hafeez Contractor, the project offers breathtaking golf course views, sprawling 3, 4, and 5 BHK layouts (spanning up to 20,000 sq.ft for penthouses), and resort-grade amenities. It acts as a major wealth-preservation asset for HNIs.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A premier investment option in the NCR. Its golf-centric master plan and premium location secure high asset valuation resilience, protecting capital from suburban market fluctuations.
why_buy: Unmatched luxury and massive room scales.
Stunning golf-course views and elite community.
why_avoid: Massive ticket size restricts the buyer pool.
decision_profile.best_for: HNIs, Expatriates, and top-tier Corporate Executives.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Standard investors seeking quick rental yields.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: A crown-jewel asset for wealth preservation.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Corner and high-floor units command aggressive premiums.

recommendation.primary_thesis: The pinnacle of expressway luxury living.
recommendation.investor_thesis: Low yield but huge capital safety.

project.name: ATS Homekraft Happy Trails
project.address: Plot No-GH2A, Sector 10 Noida Extension, Greater Noida
project.description: A highly sought-after delivered project in Sector 10 offering 2 & 3 BHK premium homes backed by the trusted ATS legacy.
project.long_description: ATS Homekraft Happy Trails is the inaugural flagship project of ATS Homekraft. Spread over 8.59 acres, it offers 12 high-rise towers containing 1,239 apartments. Known for its lush landscaping, central clubhouse, and adherence to ATS's high construction standards, it has become a highly liquid, premium asset in Greater Noida West.
ai_search_keywords: ready to move flats greater noida west

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A highly reliable, ready-to-move option for end-users offering the trademark ATS landscaping, strong secondary market liquidity, and robust rental demand.
why_buy: Trusted ATS construction and landscape quality.
Active resale market makes it easy to enter or exit.
why_avoid: Prices have already peaked upon delivery, limiting short-term flip margins.
decision_profile.best_for: Families and end-users who want zero delivery risk and a vibrant community.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: A benchmark standard for Greater Noida West.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Highly recommended for families looking for immediate occupancy.

recommendation.primary_thesis: The safest mid-premium bet in Sector 10.

project.name: Eldeco Ballads of Bliss
project.address: GH-1A/2, Sector 22D, Yamuna Expressway, Greater Noida
project.description: An upcoming premium residential asset situated on the Yamuna Expressway offering incredible long-term growth tied to the new airport.
project.long_description: Eldeco Ballads of Bliss by Eldeco Group is a newly launched 5-acre project in Sector 22D, Yamuna Expressway. Offering 558 units across 3 towers, it features 2, 3 BHKs, and Duplex Penthouses. It is a pure growth-corridor investment, directly benefiting from its proximity to the upcoming Jewar International Airport and the surrounding SEZ.

investment_insights.price_appreciation: High future growth tied to airport

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A pure infrastructure-driven growth play. Eldeco brings reliability to the Yamuna Expressway corridor, capturing the upside of the Jewar Airport expansion.
why_buy: Directly benefits from the multi-billion dollar Jewar Airport infrastructure boom.
why_avoid: Social infrastructure in the immediate vicinity is still developing.
decision_profile.best_for: Growth investors wanting to lock in capital near the new airport corridor.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Buyers looking for immediate end-use or rental income.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Capitalize on early construction-linked plans to spread out cash flow.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Capital compounding via regional infrastructure growth.

recommendation.primary_thesis: Top infrastructure play in the NCR.
recommendation.investor_thesis: Lock in low base prices now.
recommendation.risk_thesis: Builder is safe, but area is still nascent.
recommendation.timeline_advice: Buy at launch for best rates.

project.name: CRC Maesta
project.address: Sector 1, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh
project.description: An exclusive, low-density premium project by CRC Group overlooking the Hindon River Reserve, offering spacious 3 & 4 BHK residences.
project.long_description: CRC Maesta is a highly exclusive residential enclave located in the premium Sector 1 of Greater Noida West. With just 358 units spread over 3.64 acres, it offers a remarkably low-density environment. It features massive layouts up to 2,690 sq.ft., a luxurious 26,000 sq.ft. clubhouse, and tranquil views of the Hindon River Reserve.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A highly premium asset in the transitionary Sector 1 corridor that successfully combines low-density exclusivity with massive floor plans and serene river reserve views.
why_buy: Unobstructed views of the Hindon River Reserve.
Excellent location right at the entrance of Greater Noida West (Sector 1).
why_avoid: Premium pricing places it well above the standard Noida Extension averages.
decision_profile.best_for: Professionals and upgraders wanting a distinct luxury address without moving to Central Noida.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: A superior luxury product in a great micro-location.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Compare with Irish Platinum to decide between Sector 1 location vs Sector 10 amenities.

recommendation.investment_thesis: Good appreciation potential as the structure completes.
recommendation.investor_thesis: High entry cost limits raw yield percentages.
recommendation.risk_thesis: Builder has successfully delivered prior projects.

competitors.verdict: Both excellent; Maesta wins on location, Irish on spatial volume.
competitors.price_delta_note: Similarly priced in the luxury tier.
